comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
Dumpy's Rusty Nuts, Twelfth Night, Waysted and Nazareth recorded live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender in Great Yarmouth held between 12-14 Oct 1984.

track_listing.track: Dumpy's Rusty Nuts - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender (on File 1)
Twelfth Night - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender (Tracks 1 - 3 on File 1. Track 4 on File 3)
Waysted - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender (File 2 and 3)
Nazareth - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender (* on File 3)
